h2: New Electric Fireplace from Heat & Glo Turns Up the Heat on Realistic Flame Technology
Heat & Glo Fireplaces Featured on HGTV’s Rock the Block Season 4
New Heat & Glo Fireplace Redefines Realism
New Fire Features Add Romance, Comfort And Resale Value To Home Spaces

paragraphs: The new SimpliFire Inception Electric Fireplace offers the most realistic fire yet, giving homeowners and designers more reason to go electric with their fire features.

Heat & Glo® was thrilled to participate once again in HGTV’s hit renovation show “Rock the Block”. This season the teams competed in Berthoud, Colorado to renovate four identical properties worth $1.9 million each. The teams had six weeks and $250,000 to renovate the 5,000 square foot homes.
For media inquiries or requests for press materials, photos, videos, and media interviews concerning Heat&Glo, please contact:Public Relations DepartmentEmail: mediainfo@hearthnhome.com
If you are not a member of the media, please contact us through our Get in Touch form and a member of our Consumer Care team will contact you directly by email.
